faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Trading Signals AI

questions.a: Trading Signals AI is an advanced algorithmic platform that provides institutional-grade signals and automated trading solutions powered by deep learning models.
Signal channels are specialized algorithmic streams designed for specific market conditions like scalping, momentum, or trend-following.
Yes, our platform supports full automation via API integration with major exchanges like Binance, Bybit, and OKX.

questions.q: Is the platform suitable for beginners?
questions.a: Absolutely. While powerful, our TSAI Assist channel is specifically designed with simple, guided signals for those new to trading.
Yes. We pride ourselves on full transparency. Every signal's performance is tracked in real-time and visible on our dashboard.
We use AES-256 encryption for API keys and only require 'Trade' permissions. We never have access to withdraw your funds.
